title: Fix spacing issues in PDF document output

requirements.summary: Audit and fix all spacing issues in the generated PDF document to ensure consistent vertical spacing, proper padding, and balanced layout across all sections
acceptanceCriteria: All PDF sections have consistent and visually balanced vertical spacing between them.
No content appears cramped or overlapping within sections.
Section headers and field labels have appropriate padding/margins so they are clearly separated from content.
The generated PDF fills the letter-sized page without excessive empty space or content overflow.
Signature section is properly spaced and positioned at the bottom of the document.

file_operations.description: Review and adjust all vertical spacing values (yPos increments), section margins, padding around headers and labels, and line heights throughout the PDF generation logic. Ensure consistent spacing between the punch times section, project info section, personnel section, work details section, and signature section. Add appropriate whitespace after section headers, standardize field label-to-content spacing, and balance the overall page layout to prevent cramped or overly loose appearance. Maintain the existing jsPDF API usage and letter-size page dimensions while only modifying spacing/layout parameters.
